description: Scene geometry type contract -- TypeScript interfaces for SceneGeometry and PlaneSlot per Section 8.6. PlaneSlot extends PlaneTransform from OBJ-003, adding required flag, description, renderOrder, transparent, and fogImmune fields. SceneGeometry defines name, slots record, compatible_cameras list, default_camera, optional fog config, description, and advisory preferred_aspect. Includes geometry registry with lock-on-first-read deep-freeze semantics, structural validation (11 rules), slot naming conventions (/^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$/), and slot utility functions.
notes: Tier 1 contract. Defines the type system for all 8 scene geometry implementations. Key decisions: PlaneSlot extends PlaneTransform (D11), immutable templates with deep freeze (D9/D10), registry locks on first read (D10), string-based camera references to avoid circular deps with OBJ-006 (D7), regex-based slot naming not enum (D8). 4-round deliberation converged with 9 issues identified and resolved.
